; translate.qmd - toolbar button plus safe overlay panel shell
; ASCII only: qmldiff on-device ignored UTF-8 content previously.

AFFECT [[11313888899523275277]]
    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]]#[[6504254477]]
        LOCATE BEFORE ALL
        INSERT {
            property bool translatePanelVisible: false
            property real translatePanelX: 60
            property real translatePanelY: 120
        }

        TRAVERSE [[6502786168]]#[[233745975898428]] > [[8398044571386570029]]
            LOCATE BEFORE [[7712155293725601]][.[[8399878573055752961]]=[["3575461827597527778]]]
            INSERT {
                ~&454089850271038938&~ {
                    ~&5972374&~: translateToggleButton
                    ~&233745975898428&~: ~&6504254477&~
                    ~&6504337259&~: ~&454089850271038938&~.~&6503187275&~.~&14888501028015932088&~

                    ~&7713561545874130&~: ~&6504254477&~.translatePanelVisible
                    ~&8399601734642709923&~: ~&"5204540755240042894&~
                    ~&233726547792244&~: ~&6504329801&~
                    ~&233748328658231&~: !!~&7712934851008712&~ && ~&6504254477&~.~&7712989577739634&~ && ~&6504254477&~.~&4367731859579753176&~ > 7
                    ~&214641332312&~: !!~&7712934851008712&~ && ~&6504254477&~.~&4367731859579753176&~ > 7

                    ~&254542253295368380&~: {
                        translatePanel.togglePanelFromToolbar()
                    }
                }
            }
        END TRAVERSE
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

AFFECT [[1224665461898798997]]
    IMPORT net.asivery.CommandExecutor 1.0
    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]] > [[6502786168]]#[[15549782143769420265]]
        LOCATE AFTER [[233704648923420]]
        INSERT {
            Item {
                id: translatePanel
                visible: ~&233745975898428&~.translatePanelVisible
                x: panelOriginX()
                y: panelOriginY()
                width: collapsed ? handleSize : expandedWidth
                height: collapsed ? handleSize : panelExpandedHeight()
                z: 1000
                clip: true

                property real handleSize: 60
                property real expandedWidth: 760
                property real bodyEdgeMargin: 16
                property real bodyInnerMargin: 10
                property real minBodyHeight: 120
                property real panelMargin: 8
                property bool collapsed: false
                property bool loading: false
                property string sourceText: ""
                property string translatedText: ""
                property string sourceLang: "auto"
                property string targetLang: "en"
                property bool translateAfterLoad: false
                property bool expandLeft: false
                property bool expandUp: false
                property var sourceLangs: [
                    { code: "auto", label: "Auto" },
                    { code: "ko", label: "KR" },
                    { code: "zh-CN", label: "CN" },
                    { code: "en", label: "EN" }
                ]
                property var targetLangs: [
                    { code: "ko", label: "KR" },
                    { code: "zh-CN", label: "CN" },
                    { code: "en", label: "EN" },
                    { code: "ja", label: "JP" },
                    { code: "es", label: "ES" },
                    { code: "fr", label: "FR" },
                    { code: "de", label: "DE" },
                    { code: "it", label: "IT" },
                    { code: "pt", label: "PT" },
                    { code: "ru", label: "RU" }
                ]

                CommandExecutor {
                    id: translateCommandExecutor
                }

                function viewportWidth() {
                    if (parent && parent.width) return parent.width
                    return expandedWidth + panelMargin * 2
                }

                function viewportHeight() {
                    if (parent && parent.height) return parent.height
                    return handleSize + minBodyHeight + bodyEdgeMargin + panelMargin * 2
                }

                function clampCoord(value, itemSize, viewportSize) {
                    var minValue = panelMargin
                    var maxValue = viewportSize - itemSize - panelMargin
                    if (maxValue < minValue)
                        maxValue = minValue
                    if (value < minValue) return minValue
                    if (value > maxValue) return maxValue
                    return value
                }

                function currentAnchorX() {
                    return clampCoord(~&233745975898428&~.translatePanelX, handleSize, viewportWidth())
                }

                function currentAnchorY() {
                    return clampCoord(~&233745975898428&~.translatePanelY, handleSize, viewportHeight())
                }

                function chooseHorizontalPlacement(anchorX) {
                    var rightOrigin = clampCoord(anchorX, expandedWidth, viewportWidth())
                    var leftOrigin = clampCoord(anchorX - (expandedWidth - handleSize), expandedWidth, viewportWidth())
                    var rightShift = Math.abs(rightOrigin - anchorX)
                    var leftShift = Math.abs((leftOrigin + expandedWidth - handleSize) - anchorX)
                    if (leftShift < rightShift) return true
                    if (rightShift < leftShift) return false
                    return anchorX + expandedWidth > viewportWidth() - panelMargin
                }

                function chooseVerticalPlacement(anchorY) {
                    var panelHeight = panelExpandedHeight()
                    var downOrigin = clampCoord(anchorY, panelHeight, viewportHeight())
                    var upOrigin = clampCoord(anchorY - (panelHeight - handleSize), panelHeight, viewportHeight())
                    var downShift = Math.abs(downOrigin - anchorY)
                    var upShift = Math.abs((upOrigin + panelHeight - handleSize) - anchorY)
                    if (upShift < downShift) return true
                    if (downShift < upShift) return false
                    return anchorY + panelHeight > viewportHeight() - panelMargin
                }

                function refreshPlacement() {
                    if (collapsed) {
                        expandLeft = false
                        expandUp = false
                        return
                    }
                    var anchorX = currentAnchorX()
                    var anchorY = currentAnchorY()
                    expandLeft = chooseHorizontalPlacement(anchorX)
                    expandUp = chooseVerticalPlacement(anchorY)
                }

                function panelOriginX() {
                    var anchorX = currentAnchorX()
                    if (collapsed) return anchorX
                    if (expandLeft) {
                        return clampCoord(anchorX - (expandedWidth - handleSize), expandedWidth, viewportWidth())
                    }
                    return clampCoord(anchorX, expandedWidth, viewportWidth())
                }

                function panelOriginY() {
                    var anchorY = currentAnchorY()
                    var panelHeight = panelExpandedHeight()
                    if (collapsed) return anchorY
                    if (expandUp) {
                        return clampCoord(anchorY - (panelHeight - handleSize), panelHeight, viewportHeight())
                    }
                    return clampCoord(anchorY, panelHeight, viewportHeight())
                }

                function maxExpandedHeight() {
                    var capHeight = Math.floor(viewportHeight() * 0.5)
                    var minHeight = handleSize + bodyEdgeMargin + minBodyHeight
                    if (capHeight < minHeight)
                        capHeight = minHeight
                    return capHeight
                }

                function desiredBodyHeight() {
                    var contentHeight = minBodyHeight
                    if (loading) {
                        contentHeight = minBodyHeight
                    } else if (resultTextItem && resultTextItem.paintedHeight > 0) {
                        contentHeight = resultTextItem.paintedHeight + bodyInnerMargin * 2
                    }
                    if (contentHeight < minBodyHeight)
                        contentHeight = minBodyHeight
                    var maxBody = maxExpandedHeight() - handleSize - bodyEdgeMargin
                    if (contentHeight > maxBody)
                        contentHeight = maxBody
                    return contentHeight
                }

                function panelExpandedHeight() {
                    return handleSize + bodyEdgeMargin + desiredBodyHeight()
                }

                function bodyHeight() {
                    return panelExpandedHeight() - handleSize - bodyEdgeMargin
                }

                function setAnchorPosition(newX, newY) {
                    ~&233745975898428&~.translatePanelX = clampCoord(newX, handleSize, viewportWidth())
                    ~&233745975898428&~.translatePanelY = clampCoord(newY, handleSize, viewportHeight())
                    refreshPlacement()
                }

                function showTranslationPanel() {
                    collapsed = false
                    refreshPlacement()
                }

                function collapseToIcon() {
                    collapsed = true
                    saveConfig()
                }

                function expandFromIcon() {
                    collapsed = false
                    refreshPlacement()
                    saveConfig()
                }

                function togglePanelFromToolbar() {
                    if (~&233745975898428&~.translatePanelVisible) {
                        ~&233745975898428&~.translatePanelVisible = false
                        saveConfig()
                        return
                    }
                    showTranslationPanel()
                    ~&233745975898428&~.translatePanelVisible = true
                    saveConfig()
                }

                function normalizeDisplayText(newText) {
                    var lines = (newText || "").replace(/\r/g, "\n").split("\n")
                    var out = ""
                    var pendingBreak = false
                    var i = 0

                    while (i < lines.length) {
                        var line = translatePanel.trimString(lines[i])
                        if (!line.length) {
                            if (out.length > 0)
                                pendingBreak = true
                            i++
                            continue
                        }

                        if (!out.length) {
                            out = line
                            pendingBreak = false
                            i++
                            continue
                        }

                        if (pendingBreak) {
                            out += "\n\n" + line
                            pendingBreak = false
                            i++
                            continue
                        }

                        var prevChar = out[out.length - 1]
                        var nextChar = line[0]
                        if (translatePanel.isSentenceBreakChar(prevChar)) {
                            out += "\n" + line
                        } else {
                            out += translatePanel.chooseInlineJoiner(prevChar, nextChar) + line
                        }
                        i++
                    }

                    while (out.indexOf("\n\n\n") !== -1)
                        out = out.replace("\n\n\n", "\n\n")
                    return out
                }

                function isSentenceBreakChar(ch) {
                    if (!ch || !ch.length) return false
                    var code = ch.charCodeAt(0)
                    return ch === "." || ch === "!" || ch === "?" ||
                           code === 12290 || code === 65281 || code === 65311
                }

                function isTightJoinChar(ch) {
                    return ch === "," || ch === "." || ch === "!" || ch === "?" ||
                           ch === ":" || ch === ";" || ch === ")" || ch === "]" ||
                           ch === "}" || ch === "\"" || ch === "'" || ch === "%"
                }

                function chooseInlineJoiner(prevChar, nextChar) {
                    if (!prevChar || !nextChar) return " "
                    if (prevChar === "-") return ""
                    if (translatePanel.isTightJoinChar(nextChar)) return ""
                    return " "
                }

                function isContextSeparatorChar(ch) {
                    if (!ch || !ch.length) return false
                    var code = ch.charCodeAt(0)
                    if (ch === " " || ch === "\n" || ch === "\r" || ch === "\t")
                        return true
                    return ch === "." || ch === "," || ch === "!" || ch === "?" ||
                           ch === ":" || ch === ";" || code === 12290 ||
                           code === 65292 || code === 65281 || code === 65311 ||
                           code === 65307 || code === 65306
                }

                function contextPrefixFromPreviousPage(text) {
                    var trimmed = translatePanel.trimString((text || "").replace(/\r/g, "\n"))
                    var i = trimmed.length - 1
                    while (i >= 0) {
                        if (translatePanel.isContextSeparatorChar(trimmed[i]))
                            return translatePanel.trimString(trimmed.substring(i + 1))
                        i--
                    }
                    return trimmed
                }

                function contextSuffixFromNextPage(text) {
                    var trimmed = translatePanel.trimString((text || "").replace(/\r/g, "\n"))
                    var i = 0
                    while (i < trimmed.length) {
                        if (translatePanel.isContextSeparatorChar(trimmed[i]))
                            return translatePanel.trimString(trimmed.substring(0, i + 1))
                        i++
                    }
                    return trimmed
                }

                function expandPdfPageToSentenceBoundaries(prevText, currentText, nextText) {
                    var merged = translatePanel.trimString(currentText || "")
                    var prefix = translatePanel.contextPrefixFromPreviousPage(prevText)
                    var suffix = translatePanel.contextSuffixFromNextPage(nextText)

                    if (prefix.length > 0 && (merged.length === 0 || !translatePanel.isContextSeparatorChar(merged[0]))) {
                        if (merged.length > 0) {
                            merged = prefix + translatePanel.chooseInlineJoiner(prefix[prefix.length - 1], merged[0]) + merged
                        } else {
                            merged = prefix
                        }
                    }

                    if (suffix.length > 0 &&
                        (merged.length === 0 || !translatePanel.isContextSeparatorChar(merged[merged.length - 1]))) {
                        if (merged.length > 0) {
                            merged += translatePanel.chooseInlineJoiner(merged[merged.length - 1], suffix[0]) + suffix
                        } else {
                            merged = suffix
                        }
                    }

                    return translatePanel.trimString(merged)
                }

                function setSourceText(newText) {
                    sourceText = normalizeDisplayText(newText)
                }

                function setTranslatedText(newText) {
                    translatedText = normalizeDisplayText(newText)
                    refreshPlacement()
                }

                function sourceLangLabel() {
                    var i = 0
                    while (i < sourceLangs.length) {
                        if (sourceLangs[i].code === sourceLang)
                            return sourceLangs[i].label
                        i++
                    }
                    return sourceLang
                }

                function cycleSourceLang() {
                    var i = 0
                    while (i < sourceLangs.length) {
                        if (sourceLangs[i].code === sourceLang) {
                            sourceLang = sourceLangs[(i + 1) % sourceLangs.length].code
                            saveConfig()
                            return
                        }
                        i++
                    }
                    sourceLang = "auto"
                    saveConfig()
                }

                function setLoadError(message) {
                    translateAfterLoad = false
                    loading = false
                    setSourceText("")
                    setTranslatedText(message || "")
                }

                function applyLoadedText(newText) {
                    setSourceText(newText || "")
                    if (translateAfterLoad) {
                        translateAfterLoad = false
                        doTranslateText(sourceText)
                    } else {
                        loading = false
                    }
                }

                function refreshTranslation() {
                    if (loading) return
                    translateAfterLoad = true
                    loadPageText()
                }

                function targetLangLabel() {
                    var i = 0
                    while (i < targetLangs.length) {
                        if (targetLangs[i].code === targetLang)
                            return targetLangs[i].label
                        i++
                    }
                    return targetLang
                }

                function cycleTargetLang() {
                    var i = 0
                    while (i < targetLangs.length) {
                        if (targetLangs[i].code === targetLang) {
                            targetLang = targetLangs[(i + 1) % targetLangs.length].code
                            saveConfig()
                            return
                        }
                        i++
                    }
                    targetLang = "en"
                    saveConfig()
                }

                function byteAt(data, idx) {
                    return data.charCodeAt(idx) & 255
                }

                function readU16BE(data, idx) {
                    return (translatePanel.byteAt(data, idx) * 256)
                         + translatePanel.byteAt(data, idx + 1)
                }

                function readUtf16BeString(data, startIdx, endIdx) {
                    var out = ""
                    var i = startIdx
                    while (i + 1 < endIdx) {
                        var code = translatePanel.readU16BE(data, i)
                        if (code === 0) break
                        out += String.fromCharCode(code)
                        i += 2
                    }
                    return out
                }

                Rectangle {
                    visible: !translatePanel.collapsed
                    anchors.fill: parent
                    color: "white"
                    border.color: "black"
                    border.width: 2
                    radius: 0
                    clip: true
                }

                Rectangle {
                    id: translateHeader
                    visible: !translatePanel.collapsed
                    width: parent.width
                    height: translatePanel.handleSize
                    color: "black"
                    radius: 0
                    y: translatePanel.expandUp ? parent.height - height : 0

                    Rectangle {
                        id: headerHandle
                        x: translatePanel.expandLeft ? parent.width - width : 0
                        y: 0
                        width: translatePanel.handleSize
                        height: translatePanel.handleSize
                        radius: 0
                        color: "black"

                        Text {
                            anchors.centerIn: parent
                            text: "<>"
                            color: "white"
                            font.pixelSize: 34
                            font.bold: true
                        }

                        MouseArea {
                            anchors.fill: parent
                            property real pressSceneX: 0
                            property real pressSceneY: 0
                            property real startPanelX: 0
                            property real startPanelY: 0
                            property bool dragged: false

                            function toScenePoint(localX, localY) {
                                return headerHandle.mapToItem(null, localX, localY)
                            }

                            onPressed: function(mouse) {
                                var point = toScenePoint(mouse.x, mouse.y)
                                pressSceneX = point.x
                                pressSceneY = point.y
                                startPanelX = translatePanel.currentAnchorX()
                                startPanelY = translatePanel.currentAnchorY()
                                dragged = false
                            }

                            onPositionChanged: function(mouse) {
                                var point = toScenePoint(mouse.x, mouse.y)
                                var dx = point.x - pressSceneX
                                var dy = point.y - pressSceneY
                                if (!dragged && (dx > 4 || dx < -4 || dy > 4 || dy < -4))
                                    dragged = true
                                translatePanel.setAnchorPosition(startPanelX + dx, startPanelY + dy)
                            }

                            onReleased: {
                                translatePanel.saveConfig()
                            }

                            onClicked: {
                                if (dragged) return
                                translatePanel.collapseToIcon()
                            }
                        }
                    }

                    Row {
                        width: childrenRect.width
                        height: childrenRect.height
                        y: (parent.height - height) / 2
                        x: translatePanel.expandLeft ? 18 : parent.width - width - 18
                        spacing: 10

                        Rectangle {
                            width: 140
                            height: 56
                            color: "black"
                            radius: 6

                            Text {
                                anchors.centerIn: parent
                                text: "To: " + translatePanel.targetLangLabel()
                                color: "white"
                                font.pixelSize: 24
                            }

                            MouseArea {
                                anchors.fill: parent
                                enabled: !translatePanel.loading
                                onClicked: {
                                    translatePanel.cycleTargetLang()
                                }
                            }
                        }

                        Rectangle {
                            width: 160
                            height: 56
                            color: "black"
                            radius: 6

                            Text {
                                anchors.centerIn: parent
                                text: translatePanel.loading ? "Working..." : "Refresh"
                                color: "white"
                                font.pixelSize: 24
                            }

                            MouseArea {
                                anchors.fill: parent
                                enabled: !translatePanel.loading
                                onClicked: {
                                    translatePanel.refreshTranslation()
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }

                Column {
                    id: translateBody
                    visible: !translatePanel.collapsed
                    x: translatePanel.bodyEdgeMargin
                    y: translatePanel.expandUp ? translatePanel.bodyEdgeMargin : translateHeader.height
                    width: parent.width - translatePanel.bodyEdgeMargin * 2
                    height: translatePanel.bodyHeight()
                    spacing: 10

                    Rectangle {
                        width: parent.width
                        height: parent.height
                        color: "white"
                        border.width: 0
                        radius: 0

                        Flickable {
                            anchors.fill: parent
                            anchors.margins: translatePanel.bodyInnerMargin
                            clip: true
                            contentWidth: width
                            contentHeight: resultTextItem.paintedHeight

                            Text {
                                id: resultTextItem
                                width: parent.width
                                text: translatePanel.translatedText
                                wrapMode: Text.Wrap
                                font.pixelSize: 24
                                color: "black"
                                onPaintedHeightChanged: translatePanel.refreshPlacement()
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }

                Rectangle {
                    id: foldedIcon
                    visible: translatePanel.collapsed
                    width: parent.width
                    height: parent.height
                    radius: 0
                    color: "black"

                    Text {
                        anchors.centerIn: parent
                        text: "<>"
                        color: "white"
                        font.pixelSize: 34
                        font.bold: true
                    }

                    MouseArea {
                        anchors.fill: parent

                        property real pressSceneX: 0
                        property real pressSceneY: 0
                        property real startPanelX: 0
                        property real startPanelY: 0
                        property bool dragged: false

                        function toScenePoint(localX, localY) {
                            return foldedIcon.mapToItem(null, localX, localY)
                        }

                        onPressed: function(mouse) {
                            var point = toScenePoint(mouse.x, mouse.y)
                            pressSceneX = point.x
                            pressSceneY = point.y
                            startPanelX = translatePanel.currentAnchorX()
                            startPanelY = translatePanel.currentAnchorY()
                            dragged = false
                        }

                        onPositionChanged: function(mouse) {
                            var point = toScenePoint(mouse.x, mouse.y)
                            var dx = point.x - pressSceneX
                            var dy = point.y - pressSceneY
                            if (!dragged && (dx > 4 || dx < -4 || dy > 4 || dy < -4))
                                dragged = true
                            translatePanel.setAnchorPosition(startPanelX + dx, startPanelY + dy)
                        }

                        onReleased: {
                            translatePanel.saveConfig()
                        }

                        onClicked: {
                            if (dragged) return
                            translatePanel.expandFromIcon()
                        }
                    }
                }

                function loadPageText() {
                    loading = true
                    setSourceText("")
                    setTranslatedText("")
                    var confXhr = new XMLHttpRequest()
                    confXhr.open("GET", "file:///home/root/.config/remarkable/xochitl.conf")
                    confXhr.onreadystatechange = function() {
                        if (confXhr.readyState !== XMLHttpRequest.DONE) return
                        if (confXhr.status !== 200) {
                            setLoadError("Error: could not read xochitl.conf (status " + confXhr.status + ")")
                            return
                        }

                        var docId = ""
                        var lines = confXhr.responseText.split("\n")
                        var i = 0
                        while (i < lines.length) {
                            var ln = lines[i].trim()
                            if (ln.indexOf("LastOpen=") === 0)
                                docId = ln.substring("LastOpen=".length).trim()
                            if (!docId && ln.indexOf("CurrentDocumentId=") === 0)
                                docId = ln.substring("CurrentDocumentId=".length).trim()
                            i++
                        }

                        if (!docId) {
                            setLoadError("Error: no open document found in xochitl.conf")
                            return
                        }

                        var metaPageXhr = new XMLHttpRequest()
                        metaPageXhr.open("GET",
                            "file:///home/root/.local/share/remarkable/xochitl/" + docId + ".metadata")
                        metaPageXhr.onreadystatechange = function() {
                            if (metaPageXhr.readyState !== XMLHttpRequest.DONE) return
                            var pageNum = 0
                            if (metaPageXhr.status === 200) {
                                try {
                                    var pageMeta = JSON.parse(metaPageXhr.responseText)
                                    if (pageMeta && typeof pageMeta.lastOpenedPage === "number")
                                        pageNum = pageMeta.lastOpenedPage
                                } catch (e) {}
                            }

                            var contentXhr = new XMLHttpRequest()
                            contentXhr.open("GET",
                                "file:///home/root/.local/share/remarkable/xochitl/" + docId + ".content")
                            contentXhr.onreadystatechange = function() {
                                if (contentXhr.readyState !== XMLHttpRequest.DONE) return
                                var fileType = "notebook"
                                if (contentXhr.status === 200) {
                                    try {
                                        var contentMeta = JSON.parse(contentXhr.responseText)
                                        fileType = contentMeta.fileType || "notebook"
                                    } catch (e) {}
                                }

                                if (fileType === "epub") {
                                    translatePanel.loadEpubCachedText(docId, pageNum)
                                } else if (fileType === "pdf") {
                                    translatePanel.loadPdfText(docId, pageNum)
                                } else {
                                    translatePanel.loadTextConversion(docId, pageNum)
                                }
                            }
                            contentXhr.send()
                        }
                        metaPageXhr.send()
                    }
                    confXhr.send()
                }

                function extractPdfPageText(pdfPath, pageNum) {
                    if (pageNum < 0) {
                        return { text: "", error: "page out of range" }
                    }

                    var rawResult = translateCommandExecutor.executeCommand(
                        "/home/root/xovi/bin/translate-pdf-cli",
                        [pdfPath, String(pageNum)]
                    )
                    var rawText = rawResult === undefined || rawResult === null ? "" : String(rawResult)
                    var parsed = null
                    try {
                        parsed = JSON.parse(rawText)
                    } catch (e) {}

                    if (parsed) {
                        var parsedStdout = parsed.stdout ? String(parsed.stdout) : ""
                        var parsedStderr = parsed.stderr ? String(parsed.stderr) : ""
                        if (parsedStdout.trim().length > 0) {
                            return { text: parsedStdout, error: "" }
                        }

                        var parsedErr = parsedStderr.trim()
                        if (!parsedErr && parsed.exitCode !== undefined && parsed.exitCode !== 0)
                            parsedErr = "translate-pdf-cli failed with exit code " + parsed.exitCode + "."
                        if (!parsedErr)
                            parsedErr = "translate-pdf-cli produced no output."
                        return { text: "", error: parsedErr }
                    }

                    var lines = rawText.replace(/\r/g, "").split("\n")
                    var visibleText = ""
                    var errText = ""
                    var li = 0
                    while (li < lines.length) {
                        var line = translatePanel.trimString(lines[li])
                        if (line.length === 0) {
                            li++
                            continue
                        }
                        if (line.indexOf("[translate-pdf-cli]") === 0) {
                            li++
                            continue
                        }
                        if (line.indexOf("error:") === 0) {
                            if (errText.length) errText += " "
                            errText += line.substring("error:".length).trim()
                        } else {
                            if (visibleText.length) visibleText += "\n"
                            visibleText += line
                        }
                        li++
                    }

                    if (visibleText.trim().length > 0)
                        return { text: visibleText, error: "" }

                    if (!errText.length)
                        errText = "translate-pdf-cli produced no output."
                    return { text: "", error: errText }
                }

                function loadPdfText(docId, pageNum) {
                    var pdfPath = "/home/root/.local/share/remarkable/xochitl/" + docId + ".pdf"
                    var currentPage = translatePanel.extractPdfPageText(pdfPath, pageNum)
                    if (!currentPage.text || !currentPage.text.trim().length) {
                        translatePanel.setLoadError("Error: " + (currentPage.error || "translate-pdf-cli produced no output."))
                        return
                    }

                    var prevPage = { text: "", error: "" }
                    var nextPage = { text: "", error: "" }
                    if (pageNum > 0)
                        prevPage = translatePanel.extractPdfPageText(pdfPath, pageNum - 1)
                    nextPage = translatePanel.extractPdfPageText(pdfPath, pageNum + 1)

                    var expandedText = translatePanel.expandPdfPageToSentenceBoundaries(
                        prevPage.text || "",
                        currentPage.text || "",
                        nextPage.text || ""
                    )
                    if (!expandedText.length)
                        expandedText = currentPage.text
                    translatePanel.applyLoadedText(expandedText)
                }

                function loadPlainTextFile(fileUrl, missingMessage) {
                    var textXhr = new XMLHttpRequest()
                    textXhr.open("GET", fileUrl)
                    textXhr.onreadystatechange = function() {
                        if (textXhr.readyState !== XMLHttpRequest.DONE) return
                        if (textXhr.status === 200) {
                            translatePanel.applyLoadedText(textXhr.responseText)
                        } else {
                            translatePanel.setLoadError(missingMessage || (
                                "Error: failed to load extracted text (status " + textXhr.status + ")"
                            ))
                        }
                    }
                    textXhr.send()
                }

                function findEpubPageSlice(indexData, pageNum) {
                    var pat = "OEBPS/Text/"
                    var bestStartPage = -1
                    var bestInfo = null
                    var i = 0
                    while (i + pat.length * 2 < indexData.length) {
                        var matched = true
                        var j = 0
                        while (j < pat.length) {
                            if (translatePanel.byteAt(indexData, i + j * 2) !== 0 ||
                                translatePanel.byteAt(indexData, i + j * 2 + 1) !== pat.charCodeAt(j)) {
                                matched = false
                                break
                            }
                            j++
                        }
                        if (!matched) {
                            i++
                            continue
                        }

                        var endIdx = i
                        while (endIdx + 1 < indexData.length) {
                            if (translatePanel.byteAt(indexData, endIdx) === 0 &&
                                translatePanel.byteAt(indexData, endIdx + 1) === 0) {
                                break
                            }
                            endIdx += 2
                        }
                        if (endIdx + 18 > indexData.length) break

                        var path = translatePanel.readUtf16BeString(indexData, i, endIdx)
                        var a = translatePanel.readU16BE(indexData, endIdx + 2)
                        var b = translatePanel.readU16BE(indexData, endIdx + 4)
                        var c = translatePanel.readU16BE(indexData, endIdx + 6)
                        var d = translatePanel.readU16BE(indexData, endIdx + 8)
                        var e = translatePanel.readU16BE(indexData, endIdx + 10)
                        var f = translatePanel.readU16BE(indexData, endIdx + 12)
                        var g = translatePanel.readU16BE(indexData, endIdx + 14)
                        var h = translatePanel.readU16BE(indexData, endIdx + 16)

                        if (b === 0 && d === 0 && f === 0 && h === 0 &&
                            c > 0 && g > 0 && e <= pageNum && e > bestStartPage) {
                            bestStartPage = e
                            bestInfo = {
                                path: path,
                                startItem: a,
                                itemCount: c,
                                startPage: e,
                                pageCount: g
                            }
                        }
                        i = endIdx + 2
                    }
                    return bestInfo
                }

                function loadEpubCachedText(docId, pageNum) {
                    var idxXhr = new XMLHttpRequest()
                    idxXhr.open("GET",
                        "file:///home/root/.local/share/remarkable/xochitl/" + docId + ".epubindex")
                    idxXhr.onreadystatechange = function() {
                        if (idxXhr.readyState !== XMLHttpRequest.DONE) return
                        if (idxXhr.status !== 200) {
                            translatePanel.loadPdfText(docId, pageNum)
                            return
                        }

                        var pageInfo = translatePanel.findEpubPageSlice(idxXhr.responseText, pageNum)
                        if (!pageInfo || !pageInfo.path) {
                            translatePanel.loadPdfText(docId, pageNum)
                            return
                        }

                        var cacheXhr = new XMLHttpRequest()
                        cacheXhr.open("GET",
                            "file:///home/root/.cache/translate-plugin-epub/" + docId + "/" + pageInfo.path + ".blocks.txt")
                        cacheXhr.onreadystatechange = function() {
                            if (cacheXhr.readyState !== XMLHttpRequest.DONE) return
                            if (cacheXhr.status === 200 && cacheXhr.responseText.trim().length > 0) {
                                var sliced = translatePanel.sliceEpubBlockText(cacheXhr.responseText, pageInfo, pageNum)
                                if (sliced && sliced.trim().length > 0) {
                                    translatePanel.applyLoadedText(sliced)
                                } else {
                                    translatePanel.loadPdfText(docId, pageNum)
                                }
                            } else {
                                translatePanel.loadPdfText(docId, pageNum)
                            }
                        }
                        cacheXhr.send()
                    }
                    idxXhr.send()
                }

                function sliceEpubBlockText(blockText, pageInfo, pageNum) {
                    var fragments = translatePanel.buildEpubFragments(blockText)
                    var i = 0
                    var totalWeight = 0
                    var startWeight = 0
                    var endWeight = 0
                    var startIdx = 0
                    var endIdx = 0
                    var prefix = 0
                    var out = ""

                    if (pageInfo.itemCount <= 0 || pageInfo.pageCount <= 0) {
                        return blockText
                    }

                    if (fragments.length === 0) {
                        return blockText
                    }

                    var localPage = pageNum - pageInfo.startPage
                    if (localPage < 0) localPage = 0
                    if (localPage >= pageInfo.pageCount) localPage = pageInfo.pageCount - 1

                    i = 0
                    while (i < fragments.length) {
                        totalWeight += Math.max(1, fragments[i].length)
                        i++
                    }

                    startWeight = ((localPage + 0.40) * totalWeight) / pageInfo.pageCount
                    endWeight = ((localPage + 1.55) * totalWeight) / pageInfo.pageCount
                    if (endWeight > totalWeight) endWeight = totalWeight

                    prefix = 0
                    startIdx = 0
                    while (startIdx < fragments.length) {
                        prefix += Math.max(1, fragments[startIdx].length)
                        if (prefix > startWeight) break
                        startIdx++
                    }

                    prefix = 0
                    endIdx = 0
                    while (endIdx < fragments.length) {
                        if (prefix >= endWeight) break
                        prefix += Math.max(1, fragments[endIdx].length)
                        endIdx++
                    }

                    if (endIdx <= startIdx) endIdx = startIdx + 1

                    i = startIdx
                    while (i < endIdx && i < fragments.length) {
                        if (out.length > 0) out += "\n"
                        out += fragments[i]
                        i++
                    }

                    while (out.indexOf("\n\n\n") !== -1)
                        out = out.replace("\n\n\n", "\n\n")
                    return out.trim()
                }

                function trimString(str) {
                    var start = 0
                    var end = str.length
                    while (start < end) {
                        var ch = str[start]
                        if (ch !== " " && ch !== "\n" && ch !== "\r" && ch !== "\t") break
                        start++
                    }
                    while (end > start) {
                        var ch2 = str[end - 1]
                        if (ch2 !== " " && ch2 !== "\n" && ch2 !== "\r" && ch2 !== "\t") break
                        end--
                    }
                    return str.substring(start, end)
                }

                function buildEpubFragments(blockText) {
                    var rawLines = blockText.split("\n")
                    var out = []
                    var li = 0
                    while (li < rawLines.length) {
                        var line = translatePanel.trimString(rawLines[li].replace(/\r/g, ""))
                        var cur = ""
                        var ci = 0
                        if (!line.length) {
                            li++
                            continue
                        }

                        while (ci < line.length) {
                            var ch = line[ci]

                            if (ch === " " || ch === "\t") {
                                if (cur.length > 0 &&
                                    translatePanel.isEpubPhraseBreakChar(cur[cur.length - 1])) {
                                    out.push(translatePanel.trimString(cur))
                                    cur = ""
                                } else if (cur.length > 0 && cur[cur.length - 1] !== " ") {
                                    cur += " "
                                }
                                ci++
                                continue
                            }

                            cur += ch

                            if (ch === "." || ch === "!" || ch === "?") {
                                out.push(translatePanel.trimString(cur))
                                cur = ""
                            }
                            ci++
                        }

                        cur = translatePanel.trimString(cur)
                        if (cur.length > 0) out.push(cur)
                        li++
                    }
                    return out
                }

                function isEpubPhraseBreakChar(ch) {
                    var code = ch.charCodeAt(0)
                    return code === 45796 || code === 50836 || code === 51424 ||
                           code === 45348 || code === 44620
                }

                function trimLeftString(str) {
                    var i = 0
                    while (i < str.length) {
                        var ch = str[i]
                        if (ch !== " " && ch !== "\n" && ch !== "\r" && ch !== "\t") break
                        i++
                    }
                    return str.substring(i)
                }

                function decodePdfString(str) {
                    var out = ""
                    var i = 0
                    while (i < str.length) {
                        var ch = str[i]
                        if (ch !== "\\") {
                            out += ch
                            i++
                            continue
                        }
                        if (i + 1 >= str.length) break
                        var nx = str[i + 1]
                        if (nx === "n") {
                            out += "\n"
                            i += 2
                            continue
                        }
                        if (nx === "r" || nx === "t") {
                            out += " "
                            i += 2
                            continue
                        }
                        if (nx === "\\" || nx === "(" || nx === ")") {
                            out += nx
                            i += 2
                            continue
                        }
                        if (nx >= "0" && nx <= "7") {
                            var oct = nx
                            var j = i + 2
                            var count = 1
                            while (j < str.length && count < 3 && str[j] >= "0" && str[j] <= "7") {
                                oct += str[j]
                                j++
                                count++
                            }
                            out += String.fromCharCode(parseInt(oct, 8))
                            i = j
                            continue
                        }
                        out += nx
                        i += 2
                    }
                    return out
                }

                function extractPdfPageTextLegacy(pdfData, pageNum) {
                    var pageOffsets = []
                    var searchPos = 0
                    var marker = "/Type /Page"
                    while (true) {
                        var pp = pdfData.indexOf(marker, searchPos)
                        if (pp === -1) break
                        pageOffsets.push(pp)
                        searchPos = pp + marker.length
                    }

                    var blocks = []
                    var pos = 0
                    var safe = 100000
                    var iters = 0
                    while (pos < pdfData.length && iters < safe) {
                        iters++
                        var btIdx = pdfData.indexOf("BT", pos)
                        if (btIdx === -1) break
                        var cb = btIdx > 0 ? pdfData[btIdx - 1] : "\n"
                        var ca = btIdx + 2 < pdfData.length ? pdfData[btIdx + 2] : "\n"
                        if (" \n\r".indexOf(cb) === -1 || " \n\r".indexOf(ca) === -1) {
                            pos = btIdx + 2
                            continue
                        }
                        var etIdx = pdfData.indexOf("ET", btIdx + 2)
                        if (etIdx === -1) break
                        var cbe = etIdx > 0 ? pdfData[etIdx - 1] : "\n"
                        var cae = etIdx + 2 < pdfData.length ? pdfData[etIdx + 2] : "\n"
                        if (" \n\r".indexOf(cbe) === -1 || " \n\r".indexOf(cae) === -1) {
                            pos = btIdx + 2
                            continue
                        }
                        blocks.push([btIdx, pdfData.substring(btIdx + 2, etIdx)])
                        pos = etIdx + 2
                    }

                    if (blocks.length === 0) return ""

                    var targetBlocks = blocks
                    if (pageOffsets.length > 0) {
                        var pgStart = pageOffsets[pageNum] !== undefined ? pageOffsets[pageNum] : pageOffsets[0]
                        var pgEnd = pageOffsets[pageNum + 1] !== undefined ? pageOffsets[pageNum + 1] : pdfData.length
                        var filtered = []
                        var bi = 0
                        while (bi < blocks.length) {
                            if (blocks[bi][0] >= pgStart && blocks[bi][0] < pgEnd)
                                filtered.push(blocks[bi])
                            bi++
                        }
                        if (filtered.length > 0) targetBlocks = filtered
                    }

                    var output = ""
                    var ti = 0
                    while (ti < targetBlocks.length) {
                        output += translatePanel.parsePdfTextBlock(targetBlocks[ti][1])
                        ti++
                    }
                    return output.trim()
                }

                function parsePdfTextBlock(block) {
                    var text = ""
                    var i = 0
                    while (i < block.length) {
                        var ch = block[i]

                        if (ch === "(") {
                            var end = i + 1
                            while (end < block.length) {
                                if (block[end] === "\\" && end + 1 < block.length) {
                                    end += 2
                                    continue
                                }
                                if (block[end] === ")") break
                                end++
                            }
                            var str = translatePanel.decodePdfString(block.substring(i + 1, end))
                            var rest = translatePanel.trimLeftString(block.substring(end + 1))
                            if (rest.indexOf("Tj") === 0 || rest.indexOf("TJ") === 0 || rest.indexOf("'") === 0 || rest.indexOf("\"") === 0)
                                text += str
                            i = end + 1
                            continue
                        }

                        if (ch === "[") {
                            var aEnd = block.indexOf("]", i)
                            if (aEnd !== -1) {
                                var afterArr = translatePanel.trimLeftString(block.substring(aEnd + 1))
                                if (afterArr.indexOf("TJ") === 0) {
                                    var arr = block.substring(i + 1, aEnd)
                                    var ai = 0
                                    while (ai < arr.length) {
                                        if (arr[ai] === "(") {
                                            var ae = ai + 1
                                            while (ae < arr.length) {
                                                if (arr[ae] === "\\" && ae + 1 < arr.length) {
                                                    ae += 2
                                                    continue
                                                }
                                                if (arr[ae] === ")") break
                                                ae++
                                            }
                                            text += translatePanel.decodePdfString(arr.substring(ai + 1, ae))
                                            ai = ae + 1
                                            continue
                                        }

                                        if (arr[ai] === "-" || (arr[ai] >= "0" && arr[ai] <= "9")) {
                                            var ne = ai
                                            while (ne < arr.length && arr[ne] !== " " && arr[ne] !== "(" && arr[ne] !== "\n")
                                                ne++
                                            var nv = parseFloat(arr.substring(ai, ne))
                                            if (nv < -100) text += " "
                                            ai = ne
                                            continue
                                        }
                                        ai++
                                    }
                                    i = aEnd + 1
                                    continue
                                }
                            }
                        }

                        if (ch === "T" && i + 1 < block.length) {
                            var nx = block[i + 1]
                            if (nx === "d" || nx === "D" || nx === "*") {
                                text += "\n"
                                i += 2
                                continue
                            }
                        }

                        i++
                    }
                    return text
                }

                function loadTextConversion(docId, pageNum) {
                    var ocrXhr = new XMLHttpRequest()
                    ocrXhr.open("GET",
                        "file:///home/root/.local/share/remarkable/xochitl/" + docId + ".textconversion")
                    ocrXhr.onreadystatechange = function() {
                        if (ocrXhr.readyState !== XMLHttpRequest.DONE) return
                        if (ocrXhr.status !== 200) {
                            translatePanel.setLoadError(
                                "Error: text data not found for this document. "
                                + "For PDFs and ePubs: ensure the sibling PDF has an embedded text layer. "
                                + "For notebooks: enable handwriting-to-text conversion."
                            )
                            return
                        }
                        try {
                            var data = JSON.parse(ocrXhr.responseText)
                            if (data && typeof data.text === "string") {
                                translatePanel.applyLoadedText(data.text)
                            } else if (data && Array.isArray(data.pages)) {
                                var pg = data.pages[pageNum]
                                translatePanel.applyLoadedText(pg ? (pg.text || "") : "")
                            } else {
                                translatePanel.setLoadError("Error: unrecognised text format.")
                            }
                        } catch (e) {
                            translatePanel.setLoadError("Error: failed to parse text data. " + e.message)
                        }
                    }
                    ocrXhr.send()
                }

                function doTranslateText(text) {
                    text = text || ""
                    text = text.replace(/\r/g, "").trim()
                    if (!text.length) {
                        loading = false
                        setTranslatedText("Error: no source text to translate.")
                        return
                    }

                    loading = true
                    setTranslatedText("")

                    var xhr = new XMLHttpRequest()
                    var url = "https://translate.googleapis.com/translate_a/single"
                            + "?client=gtx&sl=" + encodeURIComponent(sourceLang)
                            + "&tl=" + encodeURIComponent(targetLang)
                            + "&dt=t&q=" + encodeURIComponent(text)
                    xhr.open("GET", url)
                    xhr.onreadystatechange = function() {
                        if (xhr.readyState !== XMLHttpRequest.DONE) return
                        loading = false
                        if (xhr.status !== 200) {
                            setTranslatedText("Error: translation request failed (status " + xhr.status + ")")
                            return
                        }
                        try {
                            var data = JSON.parse(xhr.responseText)
                            var out = ""
                            if (data && data[0] && data[0].length) {
                                var i = 0
                                while (i < data[0].length) {
                                    if (data[0][i] && data[0][i][0])
                                        out += data[0][i][0]
                                    i++
                                }
                            }
                            if (!out.length) {
                                setTranslatedText("Error: translation response was empty.")
                                return
                            }
                            setTranslatedText(out)
                        } catch (e) {
                            setTranslatedText("Error: failed to parse translation response. " + e.message)
                        }
                    }
                    xhr.send()
                }

                function doTranslate() {
                    doTranslateText(sourceText)
                }

                function loadConfig() {
                    var xhr = new XMLHttpRequest()
                    xhr.open("GET", "file:///home/root/.config/translate-plugin.json")
                    xhr.onreadystatechange = function() {
                        if (xhr.readyState !== XMLHttpRequest.DONE) return
                        if (xhr.status !== 200) return
                        try {
                            var rawConfig = xhr.responseText ? String(xhr.responseText).trim() : ""
                            var cfg = null
                            while (rawConfig.length > 0 && !cfg) {
                                try {
                                    cfg = JSON.parse(rawConfig)
                                } catch (e1) {
                                    if (rawConfig[rawConfig.length - 1] !== "}") break
                                    rawConfig = rawConfig.substring(0, rawConfig.length - 1).trim()
                                }
                            }
                            if (!cfg) throw new Error("JSON.parse: Parse error")
                            if (cfg.collapsed !== undefined) collapsed = cfg.collapsed
                            if (cfg.sourceLang !== undefined) sourceLang = cfg.sourceLang
                            if (cfg.targetLang !== undefined) targetLang = cfg.targetLang
                            translatePanel.setAnchorPosition(
                                cfg.x !== undefined ? cfg.x : translatePanel.currentAnchorX(),
                                cfg.y !== undefined ? cfg.y : translatePanel.currentAnchorY()
                            )
                        } catch (e) {
                            console.log("TranslatePlugin: config parse error: " + e.message)
                            translatePanel.saveConfig()
                        }
                    }
                    xhr.send()
                }

                function saveConfig() {
                    var xhr = new XMLHttpRequest()
                    xhr.open("PUT", "file:///home/root/.config/translate-plugin.json")
                    xhr.onreadystatechange = function() {
                        if (xhr.readyState !== XMLHttpRequest.DONE) return
                        if (xhr.status !== 200 && xhr.status !== 0) {
                            console.log("TranslatePlugin: failed to save config, status: " + xhr.status)
                        }
                    }
                    xhr.send(JSON.stringify({
                        collapsed: collapsed,
                        sourceLang: sourceLang,
                        targetLang: targetLang,
                        x: translatePanel.currentAnchorX(),
                        y: translatePanel.currentAnchorY()
                    }))
                }

                Component.onCompleted: {
                    translatePanel.loadConfig()
                    translatePanel.setSourceText("")
                    translatePanel.setTranslatedText("")
                }
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
